title: Nightshrike
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Youmay|the species|the [[Cipher Nine|individual]]}} {{Otheruses|Night|more=Shrike}} {{Species |image=[[File:9nightshrike.jpg]] |name=Nightshrike |designation=Non-[[Sentience/Legends|sentient]][[Star Wars (1977) 35|''Star Wars'' (1977) 35]] |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions= |lifespan= |origin=[[Monastery/Legends|Monastery]] |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|What was this thing, Domina?"
"A nightshrike... they usually prey on other creatures in the great rainforests. I can't imagine why it was out during the day... the sunlight might have driven it mad, made it attack.|Luke Skywalker and Domina Tagge|}} '''Nightshrikes''' were an imposing avian predator native to the [[Forest/Legends|rainforests]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Monastery/Legends|Monastery]]. Large and bat-like, nightshrikes were nocturnal and mostly preyed on the other beasts of the forests. As such, they were rarely seen during the [[Standard day/Legends|day]]—however, in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] leader [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Order of the Sacred Circle]] [[Priest/Legends|priestess]] [[Domina Tagge/Legends|Domina Tagge]] faced a rare daytime attack from a nightshrike, with Skywalker slaying the beast with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. ==Behind the scenes== Nightshrikes first appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 35|''Star Wars'' (1977) 35]], a [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel ''Star Wars'']] comic book issue written by [[Archie Goodwin]] and released in [[1980]]. In the comic, the beast was illustrated by [[Carmine Infantino]]. In ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', Imperial Agent players are given the callsign Nightshrike when they receive their personal ship. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 35|''Star Wars'' (1977) 35]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 35}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{CSWECite|II|380|Nightshrike}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of nightshrikes}} {{Reflist}} [[Category:Bats]] [[Category:Carnivorous creatures]] [[Category:Creatures of Monastery]] [[Category:Flying creatures]] [[Category:Jungle and forest creatures]] [[Category:Nocturnal creatures]] [[Category:Semi-sentient species]]
